papers.title_en: High-fidelity super-resolution CT radiomics for non-invasive EGFR mutation prediction in lung adenocarcinoma: a multi-center pooled analysis
papers.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了一种基于残差通道注意力网络（RCAN）的高保真超分辨率（SR）增强影像组学框架，旨在通过常规CT图像非侵入性地预测肺腺癌（LUAD）中的EGFR基因突变。通过多中心汇总分析，该方法显著提升了图像质量及影像组学特征的预测效能，为肺癌精准诊疗提供了一种高效、无创的分子分型评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Objective To develop and validate a high-fidelity super-resolution (SR)-enhancedradiomics framework using a Residual Channel Attention Network (RCAN) for non-invasive EGFR mutation prediction in lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD). Methods This …

papers.title_en: Postoperative disease-free survival prediction based on MRI radiomics combined with clinicopathological factors in locally advanced rectal cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提高局部晚期直肠癌（LARC）患者术后无病生存期（DFS）的预测准确性。研究通过整合术后MRI影像组学特征与关键临床病理因素，构建了一个综合预测模型。结果表明，该多模态模型能有效识别新辅助放化疗及手术后仍具有高复发风险的患者，为临床制定个性化随访和辅助治疗方案提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Background Reliable prediction of disease-free survival (DFS) may help identifypatients with locally advanced rectal cancer (LARC) who remain at high risk ofdisease recurrence or death after neoadjuvant chemoradiotherapy (NCRT) and …

papers.title_en: X-CapFusion: Efficient label-aware model for medical image captioning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对X射线医学图像描述生成任务，提出了X-CapFusion模型。该模型通过融合临床显著标签信息，旨在解决现有模型在生成描述时准确性不足的问题。通过在最先进的基准模型基础上进行系统性改进，X-CapFusion能够生成更精确、更具临床价值的医学报告，显著提升了医疗辅助诊断的效率和质量。
papers.abstract_en: This paper explores advanced methods to enhance medical image captioning for X-ray images, leveraging clinically significant labels to generate precise, informativedescriptions. Building on state-of-the-art baseline models, this study systematically …

papers.title_en: RadBridge: Radiomics-Guided Brownian Bridge Diffusion from CT to MRI
papers.tldr: 本研究针对急性缺血性脑卒中（AIS）中CT对早期病变敏感性低的问题，提出了RadBridge框架。该方法利用影像组学特征引导布朗桥扩散模型（BBDM），实现了从CT图像到MRI图像的高质量合成。通过引入影像组学引导，模型能够更有效地捕捉细微的病理变化，为临床提供具有MRI级软组织对比度的合成图像，辅助卒中诊断。
papers.abstract_en: In acute ischemic stroke (AIS), MRI synthesis from readily available CT images canoffer MRI-like soft-tissue contrast without requiring additional image acquisition.However, the limited sensitivity of CT to early ischemic lesions makes this task …

papers.title_en: Swin-Qwen3: A Three-Stage Vision–Language Framework for Automated Radiology Report Generation with Multi-Agent Verification
papers.tldr: 针对放射科报告自动生成中存在的幻觉和事实错误问题，本文提出了Swin-Qwen3框架。该框架采用三阶段视觉-语言处理流程，结合Swin Transformer和Qwen模型，并引入创新的多智能体验证机制。通过多阶段优化与智能体间的协作校验，该研究显著提升了胸部X射线报告的准确性和临床一致性，为缓解全球放射服务压力提供了更可靠的自动化方案。
papers.abstract_en: Automated chest X-ray reporting could substantially reduce the burden on radiologyservices worldwide, yet the clinical deployment of current vision–language models(VLMs) remains constrained by factual errors, hallucinations, and inadequate …

papers.title_en: MedBench: Deliberative Evaluation of Medical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出MedBench，一个旨在将医疗语言模型作为“深思熟虑代理”而非单纯预测器进行评估的新型基准。该基准涵盖来自6个医疗问答数据集的19,625个问题，对8个参数规模在4B至32B之间的模型进行了全面测试。MedBench通过模拟复杂的临床决策过程，为评估医疗大模型在实际应用中的推理和决策能力提供了更深入的视角，填补了现有评估体系的空白。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce MedBench, a benchmark for evaluating medical language models asdeliberating agents rather than isolated predictors. MedBench evaluates eightmodels (4B? 32B) on 19,625 questions from six medical QA datasets using …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大规模语言模型在异构数据上训练时，难以平衡收敛速度与领域覆盖的问题，提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束梯度匹配的微批次选择方法。该方法通过在每个训练步骤中选择与全局梯度最匹配的样本子集，同时满足各领域的分布约束，从而优化了训练效率。实验证明，该方法在保持模型泛化能力的同时，显著提升了收敛性能，为处理复杂异构数据的LLM训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: Dual-Latent Memory Routing for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在长文本生成过程中容易丢失早期视觉证据、导致推理性能下降的问题，本文提出了双潜空间记忆路由（Dual-Latent Memory Routing）机制。该方法通过引入记忆增强的路由策略，有效保留并检索关键视觉信息，显著提升了模型在复杂视觉语言推理任务中的长效稳定性与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently made strong progress invision-language reasoning, yet their performance often degrades as generationsgrow longer. A key factor is that they frequently lose track of earlier visual evidence …

papers.title_en: Towards Multimodal Large Language Models with Both Training and Inference Efficiency
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在训练与推理效率之间难以兼得的问题，本文提出了一种兼顾两者的架构方案。传统方法如LLaVA在推理时效率较低，而交叉注意力机制则在训练上存在局限。本研究通过优化模型架构，旨在实现高性能的同时，显著提升训练速度并降低推理延迟，为构建高效多模态学习系统提供了重要贡献。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mainly fall into two architectures, eachinvolving a trade-off between training and inference efficiency: embedding spacealignment (eg LLaVA series) is inefficient during inference, while cross-attention …

papers.title_en: CofactGVR: Counterfactual Intervention for Grounded Visual Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型在定位视觉推理（GVR）中缺乏中间定位信号且易走捷径的问题，提出了CofactGVR框架。该方法通过引入反事实干预机制，为模型提供更有效的学习信号，增强了中间推理过程的准确性。实验证明，该方法显著提升了模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的定位能力和鲁棒性，是提升GVR性能的有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Despite rapid progress in Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) with MLLMs and RL-style fine-tuning, existing approaches often lack effective learning signals forintermediate grounding decisions and are prone to shortcut solutions. In this work …

papers.title_en: Beyond Sunk Costs: Boosting LLM Pre-training Efficiency via Orthogonal Growth of Mixture-of-Experts
papers.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型预训练中高昂的计算成本问题，提出了一种通过混合专家模型（MoE）正交增长来提升训练效率的新范式。该方法旨在充分利用现有的预训练模型资产，通过正交扩展技术将其转化为更大规模的MoE模型，从而在避免从头训练的同时显著提升模型性能，为高效预训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: As the computational demands for pre-training Large Language Models (LLMs)continue to surge, the need for efficient training paradigms becomes critical. Despitethe vast resources already invested in existing pre-trained checkpoints, these assets …

papers.title_en: Development and validation of an interpretable ultrasound radiomics model for benign and malignant classification of breast lesions: a multicenter large-sample study
papers.tldr: 本研究利用来自8家医疗机构的3142例大样本数据，开发并验证了一种结合超声影像组学与临床特征的可解释性诊断模型。该模型旨在提高乳腺病灶良恶性分类的准确性，通过多中心验证展示了卓越的检测性能，为临床医生提供了一个可靠的无创辅助决策工具，有助于优化乳腺癌的早期筛查与诊疗流程。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives To develop and validate a combined ultrasound-based radiomics-clinicalmodel for differentiating benign and malignant breast lesions. Materials and methodsA total of 3142 patients from eight hospitals between February 2012 and September …

papers.title_en: Z-Adapter: Parameter-Efficient 2.5 DLongitudinal Fusion for SAM2-Based Lung Tumor Segmentation in CT
papers.tldr: 针对在CT图像中逐层应用2D分割模型（如SAM2）会导致纵向切片间掩码不稳定的“纵向闪烁”问题，本文提出了Z-Adapter。这是一种参数高效的2.5D纵向融合模块，专门用于基于SAM2的肺肿瘤分割。通过在相邻切片间引入空间一致性约束，该方法在保持基础模型强大分割能力的同时，显著提升了体积测量的稳定性和准确性，为医学影像的精准量化提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Promptable foundation models have accelerated medical image segmentation, yetnaïvely applying 2D models slice-by-slice on CT often yields longitudinal flicker:unstable tumor masks across adjacent slices that degrade volumetric measurements …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对生成式语言模型中嵌入矩阵随词表增大而导致参数冗余的问题，提出了 MultiHashFormer。该模型借鉴了编码器模型中的哈希技术，通过将多个 token 映射到共享的哈希向量中，极大地压缩了嵌入层的参数规模。实验表明，该方法在大幅减少参数量的同时，仍能保持与标准 Transformer 相当的生成质量，为构建轻量化、高效率的大规模语言模型提供了有效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Language models (LMs) represent tokens using embedding matrices that scalelinearly with the vocabulary size. To constrain the parameter footprint, prior workproposes hashing many tokens into a single vector within encoder-only models …

papers.title_en: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在后期训练中难以整合多种特定能力的问题，提出了多教师在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）框架。该方法通过引入多个专业教师模型，在在线强化学习过程中对学生模型进行联合引导，有效解决了传统离线微调或混合强化学习在能力融合时的冲突与效率问题。实验证明，MOPD能显著提升模型在多任务场景下的综合表现，为构建全能型大模型提供了新路径。
papers.abstract_en: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into onemodel remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are …

papers.title_en: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
papers.tldr: 本研究探索了离散扩散语言模型在放射报告交互式起草中的应用。针对传统自回归模型在非线性编辑和交互性方面的不足，研究利用扩散模型双向去噪的特性，实现了更灵活的文本生成方式。该方法在医疗基础模型领域具有重要意义，不仅在生成质量上可与自回归模型媲美，还显著增强了放射科医生在撰写报告时的交互体验和编辑效率。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Learning Anatomy-Grounded CT Vision-Language Representations with Organ-Hierarchical Report Knowledge
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有CT视觉语言预训练（VLP）在解剖结构对齐上的不足，提出了一种基于器官层级报告知识的学习框架。该方法通过将放射科报告中的器官特定知识与CT影像进行多层级对齐，使模型能够学习到具有解剖学意义的表征。实验证明，该方法在器官分割、疾病分类等下游任务中表现优异，显著提升了医学影像表征的准确性和可解释性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision-language pretraining (VLP) from paired CT images and radiologyreports enables scalable representation learning, but most existing methods aligneither whole scans with entire reports or local image regions with text fragments …

papers.title_en: Knowledgeless Language Models: Suppressing Parametric Recall for Evidence-Grounded Language Modeling
papers.tldr: 本研究针对语言模型内部参数化知识可能过时或与上下文冲突的问题，提出了“无知识语言模型”的概念。通过抑制模型对内部记忆的检索，强制其完全依赖外部提供的证据进行推理。这种方法旨在解决模型在证据驱动任务中的不可靠行为，提高其在处理新信息和解决知识冲突时的准确性与鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Language models encode substantial factual knowledge in their parameters, whichcan lead to unreliable behavior when this knowledge is outdated, incomplete, ormisaligned with the provided context. In this work, we study whether modifying the …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Vision-Language Pretraining with Organ-Conditioned Pattern Tokens for CT Understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对CT影像视觉语言预训练中全局对比学习忽略局部细节的问题，提出了一种基于器官条件的模式标记方法。通过将器官先验知识融入预训练过程，实现了图像与放射报告之间更细粒度的对齐。该方法在多项CT理解任务中表现优异，显著提升了模型对复杂解剖结构和病变的理解能力，为医疗影像的大规模预训练提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Computed tomography (CT) vision-language pretraining from paired volumes andradiology reports is a scalable yet challenging task. Existing methods commonlyadopt global scan-report contrast, which is scalable but obscures heterogeneous …
